answers.studentAnswer: My brother is a police officer. 내 다른 것 같다.
answers.correctAnswer: My brother is a police officer.

answers.studentAnswer: The story seems interesting. 그 재밌는 얘기처럼 보였다.
The leaves turned red and yellow. 잎은 빨갛게 변했어요. -> 좋은 잎으로 변했다.
answers.correctAnswer: The leaves turned red and yellow.

answers.studentAnswer: His voice sounds familiar. 그의 음성이 익숙하게 들린다.
This is my favorite song. 이것은 내가 제일 좋아하는.
The food smells delicious. 음식 냄새가 맛있었어요.
She stayed calm during the crisis. 그녀는 침착함을 유지했다.
answers.correctAnswer: She stayed calm during the crisis.

answers.studentAnswer: The baby grew quiet. 아기는 조용해 졌다.
Your advice was very helpful. 너의 조언은 매우 도움이 되었다.
The key is under the mat. (이 문장의 형식은 무엇일까요?) 없음. (형용)
answers.correctAnswer: The key is under the mat.
